title: Zaporizhzhia: Power outage reported
description: Power returns to Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant after prolonged outage, IAEA says. Power returned to the Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant after a 15-hour outage, the IAEA said, ending one of the longest disruptions at the facility during the war.
description_en: Power returns to Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant after prolonged outage, IAEA says. Power returned to the Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant after a 15-hour outage, the IAEA said, ending one of the longest disruptions at the facility during the war.

title: 17 drones
description: On rosTV, sweet but false propaganda baboons suddenly began to burst, and mournful whining about the real situation at the front poured out of them. The answer turned out to be surprisingly honest: according to his interlocutor, there are now about 17 drones on one kilometer of the front in Katsapny, whereas for every Russian...
description_en: On rosTV, sweet but false propaganda baboons suddenly began to burst, and mournful whining about the real situation at the front poured out of them. The answer turned out to be surprisingly honest: according to his interlocutor, there are now about 17 drones on one kilometer of the front in Katsapny, whereas for every Russian...
description_uk: На росТВ внезапно начали лопаться сладкие, но лживые бубоны пропаганды, и из них полился жалобный скулеж о реальной ситуации на фронте Во время одного из эфиров российский пропагандист поинтересовался, как обстоят дела на линии фронта. Ответ оказался неожиданно честным: по словам его собеседника, на одном километре фронта у кацапни сейчас около 17 дронов, тогда как на каждого российского...

title: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in...
title_en: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in...
title_uk: 🫠 Польща вимагала від України переглянути назву підрозділу ССО в...
description: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in honor of the UPA Polish Defense Minister Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh discussed this issue with Kirill Budanov during a meeting in Warsaw. According to him, Poland remains a partner of Ukraine in security matters, however, it is awaiting a review of the decision to award one of the subdivisions of the SSO with the honorific name "names of Heroes of the UPA"....
description_en: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in honor of the UPA Polish Defense Minister Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh discussed this issue with Kirill Budanov during a meeting in Warsaw. According to him, Poland remains a partner of Ukraine in security matters, however, it is awaiting a review of the decision to award one of the subdivisions of the SSO with the honorific name "names of Heroes of the UPA"....
description_uk: 🫠 Польша потребовала от Украины пересмотреть название подразделения ССО в честь УПА Министр обороны Польши Владислав Косиняк-Камыш обсудил этот вопрос с Кириллом Будановым во время встречи в Варшаве. По его словам, Польша остается партнером Украины в вопросах безопасности, однако ожидает пересмотра решения о присвоении одному из подразделений ССО почетного наименования "имени Героев УПА"....

title: Kyiv: Strike confirmed
description: Russia obstructed evacuations after Kakhovka dam destruction leading to civilian casualties, report says. “Russian forces and occupation authorities made effective use of the response window — the period during which an emergency has not yet reached the peak of its destructive impact — significantly more difficult,” said Roman Koval, head of research at Truth Hounds.
description_en: Russia obstructed evacuations after Kakhovka dam destruction leading to civilian casualties, report says. “Russian forces and occupation authorities made effective use of the response window — the period during which an emergency has not yet reached the peak of its destructive impact — significantly more difficult,” said Roman Koval, head of research at Truth Hounds.

title: Odesa: Casualties reported
description: Russia's war pushes Black Sea ecosystem to brink as 22 cetaceans found dead in Odesa Oblast national park Researchers found a record number of cetacean bodies on the Black Sea coast near the Tuzly Estuaries National Nature Park in Odesa Oblast in a single day: 22 animals. Read the full article on our website
